# Agent Session Pack

> CLI-only cold storage for local AI coding-agent sessions. It scans provider stores, proves compression on copied files, packs cold sessions into a local zstd vault, and restores them byte-exact into provider-native formats.

## Primary Links

- [README](https://github.com/YosefHayim/agent-session-pack#readme): Quick start, command examples, safety model, provider modes, FAQ, and local evidence.
- [npm package](https://www.npmjs.com/package/agent-session-pack): Published package and `npx --yes agent-session-pack` usage.
- [Project purpose](https://github.com/YosefHayim/agent-session-pack/blob/main/PROJECT.md): Scope, users, non-goals, and success criteria.
- [Agent instructions](https://github.com/YosefHayim/agent-session-pack/blob/main/AGENTS.md): Editing rules for coding agents.
- [Code style](https://github.com/YosefHayim/agent-session-pack/blob/main/CODE-STYLE.md): TypeScript, Effect, CLI, output, and test conventions.
- [Architecture decisions](https://github.com/YosefHayim/agent-session-pack/tree/main/docs/adr/current): Current ADRs for CLI contract, safety model, dependency choices, and CI workflows.
- [Roundtrip examples](https://github.com/YosefHayim/agent-session-pack/tree/main/examples/roundtrip): Tiny before/archive/after fixtures that show byte-exact restore.

## What It Does In v0.2.0

- Finds local AI coding-agent session stores.
- Shows before/after compression evidence without touching originals.
- Packs cold sessions only when `pack --apply` is run.
- Uses `--older-than` as the cold-session age filter.
- Writes local archives and manifests under `~/.agent-session-pack` by default.
- Verifies byte-exact restore before removing originals in apply mode.
- Restores archived sessions with `unpack --apply`.

## What It Does Not Do In v0.2.0

- No daemon.
- No timer.
- No pack-on-close hook.
- No restore-on-launch hook.
- No local web app.
- No lossy summarization or context compaction.
- No background deletion of real session files.
- No mutation of Cursor or Devin native stores.

## Supported Provider Modes

- Archive mode: Codex, Claude Code user-level sessions, Kiro.
- Backup-only mode: Cursor, Devin.

## Important Commands

```bash
npx --yes agent-session-pack guide --json
npx --yes agent-session-pack check
npx --yes agent-session-pack
npx --yes agent-session-pack pack --all-providers --older-than 7d --dry-run
npx --yes agent-session-pack pack --max --dry-run
npx --yes agent-session-pack pack --all-providers --older-than 7d --apply
npx --yes agent-session-pack pack --all-providers --older-than 7d --apply --yes --json
npx --yes agent-session-pack unpack --all-providers --apply
```

## Search Phrases

AI agent session cleanup, coding agent disk cleanup, Codex session compression, Claude Code storage cleanup, Kiro JSONL archive, zstd session archive, local-first AI tool storage, byte-exact restore, developer disk cleanup CLI.
